revision.comment: [[en:Template:Wikidata property link]] 2020年6月19日 (金) 15:19(UTC)より
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch: {{uc:{{Str left|{{{id|}}}|1}}}}
| N <!--none--> = {{#switch: {{uc:{{Str left|{{{1|}}}|1}}}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}}}]]
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}}}]]
  }}
| O <!--only--> = {{#switch: {{uc:{{Str left|{{{1|}}}|1}}}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}|{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}]]
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}|P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}]]
  }}
| F <!--first--> = {{#switch: {{uc:{{Str left|{{{1|}}}|1}}}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}|{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}]]{{#if:{{wikidata|label|{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}}}|: <small>{{wikidata|label|{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}}}</small>}}
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}|P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}]]{{#if:{{wikidata|label|P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}}}|: <small>{{wikidata|label|P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}}}</small>}}
  }}
| #default = {{#switch: {{uc:{{Str left|{{{1|}}}|1}}}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}}} <small>({{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}})</small>]]
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}}} <small>(P{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}})</small>]]
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: simplify and always uppercase
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{id|}}}}}|1}}
| N <!--none--> = {{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|1}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}]]
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}]]
  }}
| O <!--only--> = {{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|1}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}]]
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}]]
  }}
| F <!--first--> = {{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|1}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}]]{{#if:{{wikidata|label|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}|: <small>{{wikidata|label|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}</small>}}
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}]]{{#if:{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}|: <small>{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}</small>}}
  }}
| #default = {{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|1}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}} <small>({{uc:{{{1|}}}}})</small>]]
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}} <small>(P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}})</small>]]
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Wikidata_property_link]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{id|}}}}}|1}}
| N <!--none--> = {{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|1}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}]]
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}]]
  }}
| O <!--only--> = {{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|1}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}]]
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}]]
  }}
| F <!--first--> = {{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|1}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}]]{{#if:{{wikidata|label|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}|: <small>{{wikidata|label|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}</small>}}
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}]]{{#if:{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}|: <small>{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}</small>}}
  }}
| #default = {{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|1}}
  | P = [[d:Special:EntityPage/{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}} <small>({{uc:{{{1|}}}}})</small>]]
  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}} <small>(P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}})</small>]]
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Wikidata property link]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2502 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))

  }}
| F <!--first--> = {{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|1}}

  | [[d:Special:EntityPage/P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}]]{{#if:{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}|: <small>{{wikidata|label|P{{uc:{{{1|}}}}}}}</small>}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{str left|{{uc:{{{id|}}}}}|1}}
